Thanks for contributing to batonkeep! Please keep PRs focused and explain the "why".
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands run, manual checks, new/updated tests. `make test` for the backend; `npm run build` for the frontend. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **DCO sign-off** — every commit is signed (`git commit -s`). By signing off you certify
      the [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/); see
      [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md). PRs without sign-off can't be merged.
- [ ] Changes are focused; unrelated refactors are split out.
- [ ] Tests/build pass locally (`make test`, `npm run build`).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, install, or config changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens in the diff.
